scenes.speaker: Director
scenes.narration: Signing in a resident, a responder, and operations on one shared map.

scenes.speaker: Director
scenes.narration: Narration uses Qwen three text-to-speech with custom reference voices.

scenes.speaker: Director
scenes.narration: Our A I agents run on Ollama cloud MiniMax two point five models, and the stack will scale further.

scenes.speaker: Director
scenes.narration: Here is one real KampungKaki session: a medical emergency across three live roles on a single shared map.

scenes.speaker: Mei Ling
scenes.narration: Before anything escalates, I ask Pelita, our conditions agent, how my area is looking near the M R T exit.

scenes.speaker: Director
scenes.narration: While Pelita thinks, the app pulls live readings from N E A and L T A, so rainfall and traffic light up right around Exit B.

scenes.speaker: Director
scenes.narration: Pelita turns those cached rain and traffic readings into one clear local answer, with no extra fetch needed.

scenes.speaker: Aisha
scenes.narration: I am Aisha, a nearby responder, and I go on duty to declare medical and hazard support.

scenes.speaker: Mei Ling
scenes.narration: An elderly man near the smoke collapses, so I send a Medical S O S, and the map locks onto our exact location.

scenes.speaker: Director
scenes.narration: Mei Ling asks Bekal which A E D and hospital to use, while the map confirms the nearest ones around the incident.

scenes.speaker: Director
scenes.narration: Bekal returns the nearest A E D, an emergency hospital, and first-aid guidance, dropped onto the map as real pins.

scenes.speaker: Nadia
scenes.narration: I am Nadia in ops. I verify reports on the shared map, declare notices, and broadcast warnings — I decide what is public and who gets sent.

scenes.speaker: Director
scenes.narration: One incident now lives in three synchronized maps, kept consistent by retained M Q T T topics.

scenes.speaker: Director
scenes.narration: That is KampungKaki: live map evidence, A I Kaki guidance, and coordinated response in about a minute.
